context.projectOverview: Sprint 4 (Obsidian MCP adapter + config) iteration 1 PASSED all 4 success criteria but FAILED the lint hard-gate. This is a RETRY to fix ONLY the lint error. Do NOT re-architect — the implementation is correct.

items.description: Unused import 'beforeEach' from vitest. Line 8 is `import { describe, it, expect, vi, beforeEach } from "vitest";` but beforeEach is never referenced -> @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars error, eslint exit 1, violating principles 'Zero lint errors is a hard gate'.
items.fix: Remove ONLY 'beforeEach' from the line-8 import so it reads `import { describe, it, expect, vi } from "vitest";`. Change nothing else.

evaluatorFeedback.note: All 4 success criteria (sc-4-1..sc-4-4) already PASS and the full suite is green (2907 tests). Make the single one-line edit, then re-verify lint + full suite, and commit.
